info.title: Smithery Platform API
info.description: API for the Smithery platform — discover, deploy, and manage MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Provides endpoints for browsing the server registry, managing deployments, creating scoped access tokens, and connecting to MCP servers.

bearerAuth.description: Smithery API key as Bearer token

q.description: Search query for full-text and semantic search across server names and descriptions.

pageSize.description: Number of results per page (default 10, max 100).

topK.description: Maximum number of candidate results to consider from the search index before pagination.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

qualifiedName.description: Exact match on the server's qualified name (e.g. "smithery/hello-world"). Deprecated: use GET /servers/:namespace/:server instead.

namespace.description: Filter by the namespace that owns the server.

remote.description: Filter by remote status. Remote servers are accessed via URL; non-remote servers run locally via stdio.

isDeployed.description: Filter by deployment status. Deployed servers are hosted on Smithery infrastructure.

ownerId.description: Filter by the server owner's user ID.

repoOwner.description: Filter by GitHub repository owner from repository_url.

repoName.description: Filter by GitHub repository name from repository_url.

seed.description: Random seed for deterministic pagination. When provided, results use a stable sort order that is consistent across pages for the same seed value.

namespace.description: The namespace this server belongs to, or null if unassigned.

slug.description: URL-friendly short name within the namespace.

verified.description: Whether this server has been verified by Smithery.

useCount.description: Total number of times this server has been connected to.

remote.description: Whether the server is accessed via URL (true) or runs locally via stdio (false). Null if unknown.

isDeployed.description: Whether the server is currently hosted on Smithery infrastructure.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the server was registered.

homepage.description: The server owner's homepage URL, or the server's Smithery page as a fallback. Will become nullable in a future release.

bySmithery.description: Whether this server is maintained by Smithery (i.e. owned by the Smithery organization).

owner.description: User ID of the server owner, or null for community servers.

score.description: RRF relevance score from search (null for browse requests).

q.description: Search query for full-text and semantic search across skill names and descriptions.

namespace.description: Filter by the namespace that owns the skill.

slug.description: Filter by exact skill slug within a namespace. Deprecated: use GET /skills/:namespace/:slug instead.

ownerId.description: Filter by the skill owner's organization ID.

verified.description: Filter by whether the skill's namespace is verified.

pageSize.description: Number of results per page (default 20, max 100).

topK.description: Maximum number of candidate results to consider from the search index before pagination.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

slug.description: URL-friendly short name within the namespace.

prompt.description: The prompt template for this skill, or null if not publicly visible.

externalStars.description: GitHub star count of the source repository, if applicable.

externalForks.description: GitHub fork count of the source repository, if applicable.

totalActivations.description: Total number of times this skill has been activated.

uniqueUsers.description: Number of distinct users who have activated this skill.

categories.description: List of categories this skill belongs to.

servers.description: Qualified names of MCP servers this skill depends on.

gitUrl.description: URL to the skill's source repository.

verified.description: Whether this skill's namespace is verified.

listed.description: Whether this skill is publicly listed in the registry.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the skill was created.

status.description: Initial status. Will be WORKING while the release is in progress.

mcpUrl.description: The MCP endpoint URL for connecting to this server once published.

stage.description: Pipeline stage: deploy (bundle upload), scan (security/OAuth check), metadata (tool discovery), publish (generated artifacts).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the log entry.

error.description: Error details, present only when the stage failed.

status.description: Current status: QUEUED, WORKING, SUCCESS, FAILURE, FAILURE_SCAN, AUTH_REQUIRED, CANCELLED, or INTERNAL_ERROR.

type.description: Release type: hosted_shttp (Smithery-hosted), external_shttp (external URL), or stdio (local binary).

commit.description: Git commit SHA that triggered this release.

commitMessage.description: Git commit message associated with this release.

branch.description: Git branch this release was built from.

upstreamUrl.description: Upstream MCP server URL. Present only for external releases.

logs.description: Pipeline log entries. Only included when fetching a single release.

mcpUrl.description: The MCP endpoint URL for connecting to this server.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the release was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status change.

status.description: Current status: QUEUED, WORKING, SUCCESS, FAILURE, FAILURE_SCAN, AUTH_REQUIRED, CANCELLED, or INTERNAL_ERROR.

type.description: Release type: hosted_shttp (Smithery-hosted), external_shttp (external URL), or stdio (local binary).

commit.description: Git commit SHA that triggered this release.

commitMessage.description: Git commit message associated with this release.

branch.description: Git branch this release was built from.

upstreamUrl.description: Upstream MCP server URL. Present only for external releases.

mcpUrl.description: The MCP endpoint URL for connecting to this server.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the release was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status change.

limit.description: Max invocations to return. Defaults to 20.

error.example: Forbidden: You don't own this server

BuildConfig.description: Custom build configuration for cloud builds

installCommand.description: Custom install command. Defaults to 'npm install'

buildCommand.description: Custom build command. Defaults to 'npm run build'

outputDirectory.description: Directory containing the build output, relative to base directory. Defaults to '.smithery'

build.description: Custom build configuration for cloud builds

installCommand.description: Custom install command. Defaults to 'npm install'

buildCommand.description: Custom build command. Defaults to 'npm run build'

outputDirectory.description: Directory containing the build output, relative to base directory. Defaults to '.smithery'

namespaces.description: Namespace(s) the token is scoped to. Accepts a single slug or an array.

resources.description: Resource type(s) the token may access: connections, servers, namespaces, or skills.

operations.description: Operation(s) the token may perform: read, write, or execute.

metadata.description: Key-value metadata for fine-grained filtering. A single object requires all pairs to match (AND). An array of objects requires any one to match (OR-of-AND), e.g. [{"userId":"alice"},{"team":"backend"}] grants access when either condition is met.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for the constraint. Accepts seconds (number) or a duration string such as "1h", "30m", or "20s".

rpcReqMatch.description: MCP JSON-RPC request matching rules. Keys are dot-paths into the request body (e.g. "params.name", "method"). Values are regex patterns. All entries must match (AND).

Constraint.description: A policy constraint that restricts a token's scope. All specified fields within a single constraint are AND'd together. When multiple constraints are passed in the policy array, each is applied as an independent attenuation block.

policy.description: Constraint objects to restrict the token. Each constraint may include a `ttl` field (max 24 hours). Default TTL is 1 hour. Maximum is 24 hours.

organizationId.description: Optional organization ID to scope the token to. When provided, the token is minted with org context. The authenticated user must be an admin or owner of the organization.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the token expires.

enabled.description: Turn mock mode on for this connection.

scenario.description: Natural-language starting-state for the simulator (threaded into the LLM system prompt so generated data is consistent with the scenario across calls).
scenario.example: Slack workspace with an active #community-ops channel containing recent event-planning messages, plus 50 Airtable candidate records with mixed tenure and interests.

transport.description: Connection transport. Use `uplink` for a local server paired over Smithery CLI.

mcpUrl.description: URL of the MCP server. Required for HTTP connections. Omit for uplink connections.

name.description: Human-readable name (optional, defaults to connection ID)

headers.description: Custom headers to send with MCP requests (stored securely, not returned in responses)

mock.description: Run this connection in mock mode. Tool calls are LLM-simulated against the registry's scanned schemas and never reach the upstream server. Provide an optional `scenario` to seed the simulator with a starting-state description. Registry servers only; frozen at creation (cannot be toggled via PUT).

example.scenario: A developer inbox with 3 unread Q4 planning threads.

transport.description: Connection transport. Defaults to the existing connection transport when updating.

mcpUrl.description: URL of the MCP server. Required when creating a new connection. Optional when updating — omit to keep the existing URL.

name.description: Human-readable name (optional, defaults to connection ID)

headers.description: Custom headers to send with MCP requests (stored securely, not returned in responses)

mock.description: Run this connection in mock mode. Only honored on first creation; ignored on updates to an existing connection.

setupUrl.description: Hosted Smithery URL for completing setup and OAuth
Hosted Smithery URL for completing setup in the browser

mcpUrl.description: MCP server URL. Null for uplink connections.

mock.description: Mock-mode config: `{enabled: true, scenario?}` when LLM-simulated, absent otherwise.

serverInfo.description: Server information from MCP initialization (name, version)

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 100, max 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's nextCursor

mcpUrl.description: Filter by exact MCP server URL

nextCursor.description: Cursor for next page, null if no more results

name.description: Trigger name exposed by the MCP server

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the params required to create the trigger

payloadSchema.description: JSON Schema for the event payload delivered by the trigger

params.description: Trigger-specific parameters defined by the trigger inputSchema

id.description: Stable trigger instance id generated by Smithery

connection_id.description: Connection id the trigger belongs to

id.description: Stable subscription id generated by Smithery

connection_id.description: Connection scope. Null for namespace-wide subscriptions.

id.description: Stable subscription id generated by Smithery

connection_id.description: Connection scope. Null for namespace-wide subscriptions.

secret.description: Webhook signing secret. Returned only once at creation time.

tags.name: servers
tags.description: Browse the MCP server registry, manage server configuration, and handle deployments

tags.name: skills
tags.description: Discover and search reusable prompt-based skills for MCP servers

tags.name: tools
tags.description: Search for MCP tools across all registered servers

get.description: Check if the service is running
Retrieve server details including connections, tools, and security status.

parameters.name: qualifiedName
parameters.description: The server's qualified name (e.g. 'namespace/server' or 'namespace' for namespace-only servers). Use %2F to encode the slash.

put.description: Create a new server. Idempotent — returns success if the server already exists and is owned by the caller.

403.description: Forbidden (namespace not owned by user or missing servers:write permission)

parameters.name: qualifiedName
parameters.description: The server's qualified name (e.g. 'namespace/server' or 'namespace' for namespace-only servers). Use %2F to encode the slash.

parameters.description: The server's qualified name (e.g. 'namespace/server' or 'namespace' for namespace-only servers). Use %2F to encode the slash.

404.description: Server not found or not owned by user

get.description: Search and browse public MCP servers in the Smithery registry. Supports full-text and semantic search via the `q` parameter, and filtering by deployment status, verification, ownership, and more.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query for full-text and semantic search across server names and descriptions.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-indexed).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default 10, max 100).

parameters.name: topK
parameters.description: Maximum number of candidate results to consider from the search index before pagination.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Filter by specific server IDs.

parameters.name: qualifiedName
parameters.description: Exact match on the server's qualified name (e.g. "smithery/hello-world"). Deprecated: use GET /servers/:namespace/:server instead.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Filter by the namespace that owns the server.

parameters.name: remote
parameters.description: Filter by remote status. Remote servers are accessed via URL; non-remote servers run locally via stdio.

parameters.name: isDeployed
parameters.description: Filter by deployment status. Deployed servers are hosted on Smithery infrastructure.

parameters.name: verified
parameters.description: Filter to only verified servers.

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: Filter by the server owner's user ID.

parameters.name: repoOwner
parameters.description: Filter by GitHub repository owner from repository_url.

parameters.name: repoName
parameters.description: Filter by GitHub repository name from repository_url.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed for deterministic pagination. When provided, results use a stable sort order that is consistent across pages for the same seed value.

get.description: Search and browse reusable prompt-based skills. Supports full-text and semantic search via the `q` parameter, and filtering by category, namespace, or slug.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query for full-text and semantic search across skill names and descriptions.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by skill category (e.g. 'code', 'data', 'web').

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Filter by the namespace that owns the skill.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Filter by exact skill slug within a namespace. Deprecated: use GET /skills/:namespace/:slug instead.

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: Filter by the skill owner's organization ID.

parameters.name: verified
parameters.description: Filter by whether the skill's namespace is verified.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-indexed).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default 20, max 100).

parameters.name: topK
parameters.description: Maximum number of candidate results to consider from the search index before pagination.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

post.description: **Deprecated:** Use PUT /skills/{namespace}/{slug} instead. Create a new skill by linking a GitHub repository containing a SKILL.md file.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own the namespace

404.description: Namespace not found or SKILL.md not found

409.description: Skill with this slug or git URL already exists

namespace.description: The namespace to create the skill in.

gitUrl.description: GitHub URL pointing to a repository with SKILL.md

get.description: Get a single skill by its namespace and slug.

verified.description: Whether this skill's namespace is verified.

owner.description: Organization ID of the skill owner (from namespace)

put.description: Idempotent endpoint to create or update a GitHub-backed skill. Send application/json with `gitUrl`.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own the namespace

404.description: Namespace not found or SKILL.md not found

409.description: Git URL already claimed by another skill

delete.description: Delete a skill by namespace and slug. Requires ownership of the namespace.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own the namespace

get.description: Download a ZIP bundle containing all skill files.

post.description: **Deprecated:** Use PUT /skills/{namespace}/{slug} instead. Refetch SKILL.md and repository stars from GitHub and update the skill record.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own the namespace

put.description: Upload or replace a skill bundle via multipart/form-data with an `archive` file.

archive.description: ZIP file upload containing a skill folder with SKILL.md and any scripts, references, or assets.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own the namespace

502.description: Failed to store uploaded skill bundle

post.description: Create a service token for machine-to-machine authentication. Accepts API key or bearer token. Optionally apply restrictions.

get.summary: Get user's namespaces or search namespaces
get.description: When called without query params, returns the authenticated user's namespaces (backwards compatible). When query params are provided, searches public namespaces with pagination. Use ownerId to filter by owner, hasServers/hasSkills to filter by content, q for text search.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Text search query (prefix match on name)

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: Filter by owner ID

parameters.name: hasServers
parameters.description: Filter namespaces with servers

parameters.name: hasSkills
parameters.description: Filter namespaces with skills

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

post.summary: Create a new namespace with generated name
post.description: Create a new namespace with a server-generated human-readable name, owned by the authenticated user

400.description: Bad request (user already has a namespace)

put.description: Create a new namespace owned by the authenticated user or an organization. This endpoint is idempotent - if the namespace already exists and is owned by the user/org, returns success. Pass organizationId in the request body to create an org-owned namespace.

400.description: Bad request (invalid name format or user already has a namespace)

delete.description: Delete a namespace owned by the authenticated user. The namespace must not contain any servers. Skills and connections in the namespace will be deleted automatically.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own this namespace

409.description: Conflict - namespace contains servers that must be deleted first

put.summary: Create a server under a namespace (deprecated)
put.description: **Deprecated:** Use PUT /servers/{namespace}/{server} instead. Create a new server under the specified namespace. This endpoint is idempotent.

403.description: Forbidden (namespace not owned by user or missing servers:write permission)

post.description: Creates an API key owned by the organization. Requires admin role.

201.description: API key created (key value only shown on creation)

403.description: Forbidden — user is not an admin

name.description: Name for the team API key

get.description: Returns all API keys belonging to the organization. Requires admin role. Key values are not included in the response.

403.description: Forbidden — user is not an admin

delete.description: Deletes an API key belonging to the organization. Requires admin role.

403.description: Forbidden — user is not an admin

404.description: API key not found in this organization

get.description: List namespace-scoped trigger subscriptions for all connections in the namespace.

post.description: Create a namespace-scoped subscription that receives events from every connection in the namespace.

get.description: List trigger types exposed by a connection.
Get the schema for a single trigger type.

post.description: Create a trigger instance for a connection using the trigger's declared params.

get.description: Get a specific trigger instance for a connection.

delete.description: Delete a trigger instance and deregister its upstream webhook.

get.description: List trigger subscriptions scoped to a single connection.

post.description: Create a connection-scoped subscription that receives events from one connection.
Create a new MCP connection with an auto-generated ID. Requires API key and namespace ownership.

404.description: Namespace not found or access denied

get.description: List all connections in a namespace. Supports filtering by metadata using `metadata.{key}={value}` query params.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 100, max 100)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's nextCursor

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by exact connection name

parameters.name: mcpUrl
parameters.description: Filter by exact MCP server URL

put.description: Create or update an MCP connection with the given ID. mcpUrl is required when creating a new connection, but optional when updating. Returns 409 if a different mcpUrl is provided, except while the connection is input_required and the new URL keeps the same host and path.

404.description: Namespace not found or access denied

get.description: Get details for a specific connection. Requires service token with connections:read scope.

delete.description: Delete a connection and terminate its MCP session. Requires API key and namespace ownership.

post.description: Stateless MCP endpoint using Streamable HTTP transport. Accepts JSON-RPC requests and notifications. Session management is handled internally by Connect—clients should not send mcp-session-id headers. Requires service token with mcp scope.
